description_long: This object is a rack holding four surfboards, each with a pointed nose, a rounded tail, and a blue-to-white gradient color scheme. The surfboards are vertically aligned in a wooden or metal rack, which has a natural wood or camouflaged finish and supports the boards securely. Each surfboard features a diamond-shaped logo or emblem near the upper third of the deck, and the boards have a glossy, smooth surface. The fins are visible at the bottom, with each board equipped with three fins in a thruster configuration. The rack appears sturdy and is designed to keep the surfboards upright and organized, making it suitable for use in garages, surf shops, or urban recreational areas. No visible deck pads or leash attachments are present on the boards.
description: A rack holds four blue-and-white surfboards with diamond-shaped logos and thruster fin setups, all neatly organized in a sturdy wooden or metal frame. The surfboards have a glossy finish and are designed for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of a single surfboard in the rack, highlighting the blue nose, white body, and diamond logo.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all four surfboards aligned in the rack, with their pointed noses and blue-to-white gradient clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the profile of the surfboards and the rack's support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view of the rack, showing the fins of all four surfboards and the back structure of the rack.
attribute_brand_logo: Diamond-shaped logo located near the upper third of each surfboard's deck; no readable text visible.
attribute_fin_configuration: Each surfboard has three fins in a thruster configuration, with medium-sized, curved fins placed near the tail.
attribute_artwork_or_graphics: Diamond-shaped logo on each board; otherwise, the boards are plain with a blue-to-white gradient and no additional artwork.
